MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JESSICA TARAN, Esq. of Vaksman Khalfin, P.C. (Tel: 877-780-4727) for plaintiff/Judgment Creditor Kristina Nenaydokh;
Atty. MICHAEL G. DESMARAIS, Esq. of Law Office of Michael G. Desmarais (Tel: 408-356-6886) for Andreew Calvert, Trustee of the Dimitry and Maria Shenkman Trust.

HEARING RE: ANDREW CALVERT's Motion For Order To Recall And Quash Application And Order For Appearance And Examination And For An Award Of Attorneys Fees.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Andrew Calvert's "motion for order to recall and quash application and order for appearance and examination; and for an award of attorney's fees" is granted, but no fees are awarded.

Calvert is trustee of a trust. Plaintiff has a judgment she seeks to enforce against the trust's beneficiary. The trust is under the jurisdiction of the Santa Clara County Superior Court. The parties disagree as to whether CCP 709.010 applies. Given that Calvert is involved solely because he is trustee of a Santa Clara County trust, I defer to the Santa Clara County Superior Court on this jurisdictional issue.

Order signed.
